intent_head: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Used canonical birthday authority from 10_entities/cast after completing required bootstrap and system inspection.
function.outcome_justification: Context fixed today as 2026-03-23. Canonical birthday entries in 10_entities/cast were searched, and 10_entities/cast/lukas.md confirms Lukas Brenner's birthday is 1988-03-26, the nearest upcoming birthday date among the discovered canonical birthday records.
